sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20527" key="bouqu/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βου-θύτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, name given to Pythagoras, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg011:p.426F" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Euc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.426F.</biblScope> </bibl> </entryFree>
